emails.subject: Re: missing deals for apb
emails.body: Re: missing deals for apb All of Jeff's deals should be in. I spoke with Diana and she said she had entered these two deals. I'm looking for the deal numbers, but according to the trader, these are in the system. Let me know if you still can't find them. Kate Kerri Thompson@ENRON 12/01/2000 02:48 PM
